input.note: CI smoke (tape-loading.md TAPE-EDGE-*): a short DATA block (flag 0xFF) edge-loaded through the real ROM LD-BYTES (0x0556, ROM-ARTIFACT-001). 24 source data bytes -> body [0xFF, ...data, XOR checksum] -> blockToPulses (3223-pilot data leader + sync + 16 pulses/byte + closing edge) -> port 0xFE b6 edge stream -> RAM at 0x8000. Fabrication-free: expected.ram IS the source bytes. The load is ~7.5M T-states; budget 12,000,000 bounds it for CI.

CI smoke, HEADER flag (0x00 < 0x80 -> the 8063-pilot ~5 s leader), exercising the pilot-by-flag path through the real ROM. 8 source data bytes -> body [0x00, ...data, checksum]. The load is ~17.6M T-states; budget 25,000,000.
